rationale: Re-verified at 18b2624a. `git diff --stat` between round-1 SHA d327cdce and 18b2624a shows exactly one file, +85/-0: internal/panel/panel_test.go — prod code byte-identical, confirming the claimed additive-only change. The new TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues hardcodes the five gate strings plus "" with an explicit doc comment citing config.PanelGateKeys as the single source of truth and explaining why this is NOT a second enum (internal/panel must stay config-free). `grep -rn '"spec_approve"' cmd/mindspec internal/panel` matches only this test literal — no second validation enum in prod code. `go list -deps ./internal/panel | grep -c internal/config` = 0, confirming the config-free leaf holds. `go test ./cmd/mindspec -run Gate` and `go test ./internal/panel` both pass. Round-1 findings (enum-membership, config-free leaf, invalid-gate-before-write validation) remain untouched by prod code and are unaffected.
